feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Shared row axis in two tables in SAP Analytics Cloud table report
entry.content:
Hi all

we are having the following requirement from a customer.

we want to create a table report in SAP Analytics Cloud with shared row axis. On the left hand side we want to show the periodic amounts and on the right hand side the YTD amounts. In SAP BPC we could create this using the shared axis selection. Is there any relevant feature or workaround in SAC?

BR

entry.title: Standalone Event mesh Roadmap
entry.content:
Hello SAP /Experts,

Can you please suggest if standalone Event mesh should be used in new implementation  ,as use case is not extensive and does not require Advance event mesh solution and is not fitting in the t-shirt size of Advance event mesh scenario ,if standalone event mesh can be used in new implementation, can the monitoring capability be enhanced ?

what is SAP recommendation on usage of standalone event mesh , i am not finding any definitive information and guidance here ,please suggest.

Thanks,

Siddharth

SAP Event Mesh SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Is it possible to integrate two different SuccessFactors instances? Not in same landscape!
entry.content:
Hello Dear Members,

I would need your inputs on this question.

My customer has a requirement to integrate two different SuccessFactors landscapes, where data for one legal entity needs to be transferred from the Parent Instance to the Child Instance via SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) or any other possible way.

  • Is this integration technically feasible?
  • If yes, what challenges might we face during implementation?
  • If not, are there any recommended workarounds?

Additionally, can the integration include all data (e.g., employee master data, payroll-related information, organizational structure, etc.), or is it limited to transferring only a Mini Master Data (such as Employee Profile)?

Looking forward to insights from the community on best practices or possible limitations for such an integration.

Best regards,

Siva

entry.title: Can you federate content from R3 into BTP workzone?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have an existing transaction in an on premise ECC system (with embeded SAP_GWFND component) that we'd want to consume from the BTP Launchpad (SAP Build Workzone, advanced edition).

Is there any way to do this?

We tried creating an app in BTP with UI technology "SAP GUI for HTML" and the transaction code, but it didn't work (just got an internal error message when tried to access the tile within the launchpad).

We also tried federating the content from ECC into BTP workzone content management (as a new content provider), but didn't work either and all the documentation we found for on-prem federation only refers to SAP S/4HANA, SAP Business Suite or SAP Enterprise Portal (nothing for ECC R3, so not sure if this is a viable option).

Any advice or suggestion would be appreciated.

SAP Business Technology Platform SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Basic Authentication not working in BAS or CICD
entry.content:
Hi,

I am following the following tutorial with the Trial BTP Account:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/set-up-cicd.html

It asks in here to create credentials for Cloud Foundry. However, on the trial account, the credentials I use to log into BTP account do not work even with BAS, from where I have published the app being used in here. The credentials do not work on using them in Continuous Integration and Delivery either, as expected.

 

On BAS, I am only able to log into Cloud Foundry using SSO Temporary Authentication Code, but from the given authentication options, I am not sure how to log into CF. 

Could someone please help?

Thanks

entry.title: Digital Signature Implementation
entry.content:
Hi,

We are having a scenario where we need to implement Digital Signature Where when user clicks on authenticate or Sign the the user BTP Credentials should be validated . Is there any standard approach for this or documentation. can you please help.

The current product involves Fiori applications built on BTP ABAP using BTP RAP SERVICES.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Asset Manager 2410 - Branded prebuilt Client
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently working for a customer on implementing the SAP Service & Asset manager 2410 application. As part of that, we are aiming to generate the SAP Service & asset manager client with pre-built database to overcome the initial download time(sync time). can you please let me know if it is possible to generate the SSAM client with the pre-built database (similar to SAP Work Manager Agentry pre-built client)?

Kind Regards,

entry.title: BTP: Structuring subaccounts in directories
entry.content:
Folks,

So far, we have not used directories to structure our BTP subaccounts wihtin the global account. Since subaccounts have become numerous over time, it's time to group them within meaningful subdirectories. For now, we do not plan to manage entitlements on the directory level. We want directories purely for structuring purpose.

My question is: If I create subdirectories and move subaccounts into them, does this affect the subaccount in any way? I don't want to affect a running system in terms of authorizations, entitlements and so forth.

Thanks for any hint/advice.

Regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Assistance Needed: SAP CRM API Access and Neo Trial Availability
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are working on integrating SAP CRM with our system but have encountered some challenges related to API access. Specifically:

  1. We are unable to successfully authenticate and interact with the APIs. Could someone guide us on the correct procedures or steps to authenticate and gain access?
  2. Are there any additional requirements, configurations, or permissions needed for our account to access the APIs?

Additionally, we noticed a reference to "Neo trials" at the bottom of this URL: https://account.hanatrial.ondemand.com/trial/#/home/trial. Are Neo trials still active, and if so, could you share how to enable or access them?

Any help or insights on these issues would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: SSAM client stop syncing after update to 2410
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

On our backend we have successfully implemented SSAM_2405, and with the client on the same version everything was working perfectly. As soon as SAP relesed SSAM_2410 and updated the client app the sync stopped to work with an error message: "Failed to find a matched endpoint)"

To fix the sync I had to follow this blog to be able to use app again (client 2410 vs backend 2405).

First question: Is this the normal procedure we have to follow after every SAP release?

Second question: The client 2410 seems to have bugs:

"Error missing text" seems a missing label

The navigation of an order doesn't work.

The online search of orders doesn't work.

Are these known bug of 2410 client or the problems are related to the version I had to deploy to mobile services?

 

Kind Regards,

Omar

entry.title: Has anyone noticed new hires disappearing after manage pending hires?
entry.content:
The issue: we processed two employees going through the regular process in manage pending hires. After the workflow has been approved, the employees’ profile did not get populated. We can’t locate their inactive future dated profile nor find the approved workflow.

We tried to process the manage pending hires workflow again for one of the employee and at the final stage of the workflow approval, we got an error message indicating that the candidate is already hired.

Has anyone experienced an issue like this? If so, how did you resolve it? we have a pending ticket with SAP but it's taking them a while to resolve the issue.

entry.title: sape5 Demo Site Down?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am getting a bad gateway error when I try to hit https://sapes5.sapdevcenter.com/.  Is anyone aware of a planned outage, or has something gone bad on the server side here?

Thanks,

Tony

entry.title: Unable to see the Integration Suite Subscription
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am unable to see Integration Suite subscription for my trial account , I was able to work till Friday but today unfortunately I can't find. I am in mid of certification preparation and might loose all the exercises done so far.
Can you please help.
Thanks
Anita

entry.title: Delay in publishing data from SAP system to 3rd party enterprise portal
entry.content:
Hi,

I have encountered an issue in publishing data from SAP ERP (ECC system) to Enterprise portal. there is a delay of 10 mins or so in receiving data in Enterprise portal through outbound IDoC from SAP ECC system. especially in receiving the pricing details for a product; pricing table (custom table) maintained in SAP ECC system.

both SAP system and Enterprise portal are connected through a synchronous RFC using O data services.

could someone reply

1. How to approach this problem?

2  what are the validation checks I need to perform?

do the needful please.

regards

Venu

entry.title: why my integration suit got deleted automatically
entry.content: why my integration suit got deleted automatically without any notification, i did get a chance to save my all-integration flows. So, I request you to provide my all-integration flows.

entry.title: Missing IBAN Services from SAP BTP Service Entitlement / Discovery Center
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Few months back IBAN Services was available as part of SAP BTP service. But recently I don't see this available now in Discovery Center / SAP BTP service entitlement.

I have captured the link and screenshot of the service few months back. But it's not opening now. Is this service decommissioned by SAP, please suggest further.

SAP Discovery Center Service - IBAN service (cloud.sap)
Inital Setup | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Workzone Header toolbar functions not working
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am encountering an issue in our system (DEV, QAS, PRD) where certain key functions, including User Profile, Notification, Search, and Navigate Back, are not working when pressed. These buttons, highlighted in the attached screenshot. Not thing happended and not issue from console log in browser development tool.

Could you please provide guidance on troubleshooting and resolving this issue?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Henry Nguyen

entry.title: SAP Approuter Headers using Private Link Service for Azure Blob Storage
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a question in regards to the SAP Approuter (https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sap/approuter) and its handling of the "Authentication" header when sending backend requests via the SAP Private Link Service.

Use Case Explanation (see attached picture for better unterstanding):

In a recent implementiation in a customer project, I was given the task to implement PLS for writing Data to an Azure Blob Storage by use of the SAP Integration Suite. The policies within Azure only allowed Entra-Id based authentication on the Storage Account, so using Access Keys or SAS was not even a considerable option. A Service Prinicple was the way to go here. To have the endpoint of the approuter secured, we implemented an XSUAA which authenticates the Integration Suite to call the approuter endpoint (via x-approuter-authorization Header), however the JWT Token for access to the Blob had to be part of the HTTP Call as well (this must be passed with the standard "Authentication"-Header).

Problem/Question:

It took me a while to find out why the Authentication-Header never appeared in the approuter, until I found out, that the SAP approuter by default deletes this header before sending the request to the backend. On the offical documentation it says because of "security reasons" (see section "Headers"). I would like to know what are these reasons in particular? From my point of view this blocks the support of entra-id-based authentication on blob storages in Azure, which is - btw - the only officially recommended authentication mechanism by Microsoft.

For this setup to work, a manual modification of the approuter was necessary, which is not ideal, especially because it is also not clear why the authetication header is being deleted in the first place.

I would highly appreciate if someone could give an explanation, to see if or how a workaround can be achieved.

Many thanks and Best Regards

entry.title: app/router preview looking for a deleted project's path instead of it's own
entry.content:
Hello,

As a newbie at UI5 development, I am following the tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-ui.html

 

I decide to delete the original app MyHANAApp and instead created another App MyHANAApp2.

When I try to preview the ports, they do not work.

On previewing app/router, I got the below error:

#2.0#2024 12 02 18:00:02:348#+00:00#INFO#/Configuration#####m47c58h8##########m47c58h8#PLAIN##Replacing $XSAPPNAME will not take place - 'xsappname' property not found in UAA configuration.#

However, my package.json has the package name as MyHANApp2 and my mta.yaml also has the same name everywhere. On previewing Port 5000 from within MyHANAApp2, it gives the below error:

Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.css'
    at Object.readFileSync (node:fs:457:20)
    at get html [as html] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.js:10:16)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/server.js:85:39
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:149:13)
    at Route.dispatch (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:119:3)
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:284:15
    at Function.process_params (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:346:12)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:280:10)

 

It looks for MyHANAApp which I have already deleted. 

Also I connected the app with the new HANA Cloud Instance MyHANAApp2-Dev, and deleted the previous HDI Container, However, on going to the Database Explorer tab and refreshing , it does not show the container, but on navigating directly from My HANA Projects or searching manually within the Database Explorer using the + icon, I am able to load the DB Container. Although I think this is irrelevant, but thought of mentioning still

 

I do not want to create a new project with the exact same name as the tutorial, so that I can understand how the various components are interlinked, by resolving this error.

 

It is possible, that I might be a little vague in describing the problem, please let me know if I missed out anything, or should explain anything else in more detail.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Is the side-by-side BTP training updated with new course content? Found some bugs
entry.content:
Looks like this course contents are updated with different business example.

from risk-management -> incident-management. Unfortunately, we cannot copy code to test by ourselves and demo exercises are not clearly defined. There are few more bugs in the new content.

How to copy code?

Is it announced anywhere that SAP BTP is going to update the course content?

Please guide on this. Thanks.

Ref: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp
